pages.title: The Riftwright — Cover

transcript: CAPTION: LEGENDS OF THE RIFT
CAPTION: ISSUE #9 — VOLUME ONE FINALE
CAPTION: THE RIFTWRIGHT

pages.title: Inside Front Cover
pages.purpose: Quiet Second Forge parchment map + Compact invitation.
transcript: NARRATION: Legends of the Rift · Volume One · Issue Nine
CAPTION: Previously: Arkan sacrificed. Axiom awoke. Second Forge activated.
CAPTION: “Someone finally reached my Forge.”
CAPTION: VOLUME ONE FINALE

pages.title: Credits

CAPTION: Story · Art Direction · Lettering · Continuity

pages.title: Chapter Nine — The Riftwright
pages.purpose: Title page for Volume One Finale.
transcript: CAPTION: CHAPTER NINE
CAPTION: THE RIFTWRIGHT
NARRATION: Volume One Finale — history meets its maker.

pages.title: Second Forge Threshold
pages.purpose: Bridge from Issue #8: Second Forge already activating; party arrives via Meridian Road; egg further cracked; Axiom leads.
transcript: NARRATION: After Arkan's sacrifice… the second Forge answered the Gate's last whisper.
WHISPER: Begin the second creation…
CAPTION: SECOND FORGE — ACTIVE
SFX: engine-HUMMMM

pages.title: Machine That Makes Tears
pages.purpose: Artificial Rift lines + Issue #8 silhouette callback before face reveal.
transcript: SPEECH (Nira Quill): They're still manufacturing tears.
CREATURE (Axiom): Protocol… rewritten.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Arkan said they were grown to protect — not obey.
CREATURE (Spark): …yip.
SPEECH (Unknown): So… after all this time… someone finally reached my Forge.

pages.title: Archives of Blame
pages.purpose: Memory vaults show history blaming the Riftwright; Mira sees the lie's polish.
transcript: CAPTION: OFFICIAL RECORD — FIRST RIFT
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): This record was rewritten.
SPEECH (Cael Vesper): Meridian stamps. Older than Meridian ink underneath.
CREATURE (Axiom): Protocol mismatch.
NARRATION: Someone older than Meridian held the quill.

pages.title: The Riftwright Speaks
pages.purpose: Elyan Voss steps into light — tragic, not cartoon villain.
transcript: SPEECH (Elyan Voss): I am Professor Elyan Voss. They named me Riftwright so the world would have a monster.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): If you're the monster… why does the egg answer you like kin?
SPEECH (Elyan Voss): I disappeared before activation. Someone else pushed the final command. I built cradles.

pages.title: Professor Elyan Voss
pages.purpose: Elyan recounts healing intent of Forges; weaponization; Arkan's sacrifice at first Forge.
transcript: NARRATION: Riftborn were grown to protect — not obey. Then someone rewrote the protocols.
SPEECH (Elyan Voss): Arkan stayed at Engine Alpha. He sacrificed himself so Spark's line could choose.
MAGIC (Arkan (echo)): Finish the cradle, Elyan… not the war.
CREATURE (Axiom): System Restore… incomplete.
WHISPER (Arkan (echo)): The rewrite… was never Meridian's first hand.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Then help us keep what's left. No more manufactured tears.

pages.title: History Was a Weapon
pages.purpose: Elyan shows how blame was assigned; Aurelia recognizes the Voss name.
transcript: SPEECH (Elyan Voss): They needed a name. Mine was already on the blueprints.
SPEECH (Aurelia Voss): Voss… I bargained under a name I never fully owned.
SPEECH (Elyan Voss): Kin is not guilt. Choose what the name means now.
SPEECH (Cael Vesper): I opened one gate under coercion. I won't open another for them.
NARRATION: One hand remains unwritten. Older. Patient.

pages.title: Prime Companion
pages.purpose: Incubator Beta reveals Nova bloodline — Prime Companion template linked to Spark's Resonance Line.
transcript: NARRATION: The Nova bloodline — Prime Companion. Twin-key to the Last Light.
SPEECH (Elyan Voss): Spark was never meant to stand alone.
CREATURE (Spark): …!
SFX: pulse-SYNC

pages.title: Egg of Twin Keys
pages.purpose: Dormant egg reaches critical hatch; Mira chooses consent Compact over force.
transcript: SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): No force. No Meridian override. You come if you choose.
CREATURE (Spark): …come.
SFX: CRACK-kk
NARRATION: A second heart answers the first.

pages.title: Nova Hatches
pages.purpose: Egg hatches into Nova — Prime Companion; twin-key with Spark.
transcript: NARRATION: Her name is Nova — Prime Companion. Twin-key to Spark.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Welcome home.
CREATURE (Nova): …mrr.
CREATURE (Spark): …yip!
SFX: STARBURST

pages.title: Twin-Key Resonance
pages.purpose: Spark and Nova synchronize; Engines respond; Seris detects the spike.
transcript: MAGIC: TWIN-KEY LOCK
SPEECH (Elyan Voss): That's the cradle protocol. Not the weapon.
SPEECH (Seris Vale): Subject One… and a Prime. Perfect. Begin Ascendant Protocol.
SFX: ALARM-ooo

pages.title: Ascendant Protocol
pages.purpose: Seris Vale becomes Ascendant Commander — massive threat.
transcript: SHOUT (Ascendant Commander): The Forges answer me now!
CAPTION: ASCENDANT COMMANDER — SERIS VALE
SFX: ASCEND-KRRAK

pages.title: Siege of the Cradle
pages.purpose: Ascendant forces assault Incubator Beta; party defends Nova and Spark.
transcript: SFX: CLANG
SPEECH (Nira Quill): Left flank — move!
CREATURE (Mossprig): …hold.
SPEECH (Cael Vesper): Lantern line — stay behind the light!
CREATURE (Axiom): Pulse Repair engaged.

pages.title: Companions Rally
pages.purpose: Full companion cast shows found-family strength; Cindermink Break the Chain on restraints.
transcript: NARRATION: Not an army. A Compact.
CREATURE (Cindermink): Break!
SFX: CHAIN-SNAP
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): We keep each other. That's the whole doctrine.

pages.title: Engine Control
pages.purpose: Elyan and Axiom race to Twin Engine controls; Arkan echo guides.
transcript: SPEECH (Elyan Voss): If we stabilize both Engines in cradle mode, the artificial tears collapse.
MAGIC (Arkan (echo)): Remember the lattice, not the blade.
SHOUT (Ascendant Commander): Cradle mode dies with you, Professor!
SPEECH (Nira Quill): Not today.

pages.title: Roads and Lanterns
pages.purpose: Aurelia (uneasy ally) seals routes; Cael supervised ally holds lantern logistics — NOT a traitor reset.
transcript: SPEECH (Aurelia Voss): Closed Contract — no more doors for conquerors.
SPEECH (Cael Vesper): I don't ask forgiveness. I ask for useful light.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Useful light is a start.

pages.title: Twin Forge War
pages.purpose: Battlefield establishes — Second Forge vs Ascendant host; Engines roar.
transcript: NARRATION: Volume One ends where manufactured skies learn to break.
SFX: WAR-ROAR
CAPTION: BATTLE OF THE TWIN FORGES

pages.title: Last Light, First Star
pages.purpose: Spark and Nova prepare twin-key surge; Mira anchors Compact consent.
transcript: SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Only if you both choose.
CREATURE (Spark): …choose.
CREATURE (Nova): …choose.
SFX: TWIN-KEY SURGE
SPEECH (Elyan Voss): Now — cradle lattice!

pages.title: Clash — Part One
pages.purpose: Massive battle page 18/25 — Ascendant Commander vs Compact + twin-key.
transcript: SFX: KRRAAASH
SFX: VVVOOM
SPEECH (Elyan Voss): Heal the tear — don't widen it!
CREATURE (Axiom): System Restore — 62%.
SPEECH (Nira Quill): Keep the Keepers standing!

pages.title: Clash — Part Two
pages.purpose: Massive battle climax 19/25 — Ascendant armor cracks; Engines tip toward cradle.
transcript: SHOUT (Ascendant Commander): Subjects belong to the sky I make!
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): They belong to themselves!
SFX: SHATTER-RING
MAGIC: CRADLE LATTICE LOCK
SPEECH (Seris Vale): …you… rewrote my victory…
SPEECH (Elyan Voss): No. We restored a purpose.

pages.title: Engines Stabilize
pages.purpose: Twin Engines enter cradle mode; artificial Rifts collapse across the Forge.
transcript: NARRATION: The Engines remember they were built to mend.
MAGIC (Arkan (echo)): Good night, spare heart.
SFX: hummm… steady
CAPTION: ENGINES: CRADLE MODE

pages.title: History Restored
pages.purpose: Memory vaults rewrite toward truth; Elyan's name cleared in Forge records — public world still healing.
transcript: CAPTION: FORGE RECORD — RESTORED
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): The world outside will take longer. Truth isn't a switch.
SPEECH (Elyan Voss): Then I will teach. Not hide.
NARRATION: One signature still refuses the light.

pages.title: What We Keep
pages.purpose: Aftermath: Seris contained (not executed); Cael supervision continues; Compact justice.
transcript: SPEECH (Nira Quill): She'll try again.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Then we keep better doors. We don't become Meridian.
SPEECH (Cael Vesper): Supervised travel. I'll earn the unmasked road.
NARRATION: Found family is a kind of Engine.

pages.title: Found Family
pages.purpose: Quiet celebration; Elara Venn vision-only blessing; Volume One emotional close begins.
transcript: SPEECH (Elyan Voss): Professor. Keeper. Merchant. Lantern. Hunter. Companions. That's a faculty.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): That's a home.
WHISPER (Elara Venn (vision)): Keep choosing keeping.
NARRATION: A First Keeper's blessing — echo, not body.

pages.title: A Crack in the Sky
pages.purpose: Finale tease begins — night sky above the continent shows a broken star.
transcript: NARRATION: Far above healed Engines… a star forgets how to shine whole.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): What is that?
SPEECH (Elyan Voss): Not Meridian work. Older… or farther.
SFX: distant-chime

pages.title: The Shattered Star
pages.purpose: Volume One finale splash — broken star in space with sleeping companions; NEXT Volume Two.
transcript: NARRATION: Volume One ends. Something older than Meridian still dreams in pieces.
CAPTION: NEXT — VOLUME TWO
CAPTION: THE SHATTERED STAR

NARRATION: Artificial Rift production collapses when healing lattice locks.

pages.title: Behind the Lore
pages.purpose: Lore essay plate — themes of blame, consent, progress without ethics.
transcript: NARRATION: We restore what we can prove. We leave unmarked what still hunts in older ink.
CAPTION: MYSTERY RETAINED
CAPTION: Who rewrote history after the First Rift?

pages.title: Ability Spotlight — Twin-Key Resonance
pages.purpose: TCG/codex tease for Twin-Key Resonance.
transcript: CAPTION: ABILITY — TWIN-KEY RESONANCE
NARRATION: When Spark and Nova act together, cradle protocols override weapon protocols.
CAPTION: Card tease · Codex link

CAPTION: THE SHATTERED STAR
NARRATION: Sleeping companions in a broken star. An enemy older than Meridian. Volume Two begins when the sky cracks.

CAPTION: Keepers · Companions · Compact
CAPTION: Local Archive copy · Volume One Finale
